name: tok_postfix_then_prefix_range
description: '1.. ..3' — '1..' is PostfixRange (no space before, space after) producing Range(1,nil). The following '..3' has space before and no space after → PrefixRange. As prefix it produces Range(nil,3) as a fresh expression. After Range(1,nil) at RANGE precedence the next token PrefixRange has no infix rule → top loop returns. New statement reads '..3' as Range(nil,3). UNCERTAIN.
